# poweradmin_group (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a group in Poweradmin. You can look up a group by ID or name. Requires Poweradmin 4.2.0+.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a group by name
data "poweradmin_group" "ops" {
  name = "operations"
}

# Look up a group by ID
data "poweradmin_group" "by_id" {
  id = 1
}

# Use group data — id is numeric, compatible with group_id attributes
resource "poweradmin_group_zone_assignment" "example" {
  group_id = data.poweradmin_group.ops.id
  zone_id  = poweradmin_zone.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (Number) The group ID. Either id or name must be specified.
- `name` (String) The group name. Either id or name must be specified.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the group
- `member_count` (Number) Number of members in the group
- `perm_templ_id` (Number) Permission template ID assigned to the group
- `zone_count` (Number) Number of zones assigned to the group
